feat.name: Sever the Dreaming Shadow
feat.text:
As you whisper to your pusaka, it attempts to cut away an enemy’s shadow, leaving them in an eternal sleep. Your pusaka gains the following Activation.   
  
**Activate****—Cut the Shadow** (concentrate, manipulate, mental);

traits.name: Wayang
traits.text: Small people native to the Netherworld. Immigrated to Golarion after Earthfall.

feat.effect: Your pusaka becomes a kris made of darkness and drives itself into an adjacent enemy’s shadow. That enemy takes 80 mental damage with a basic Fortitude save against your spell DC or class DC, whichever is higher. If this reduces the creature to 0 Hit Points, the target doesn’t die, but its shadow is severed from its body, becoming a shadow spawn that attempts to flee from the target’s body. As long as the shadow spawn exists, the target remains in a dreamless slumber; if destroyed, the target regains its shadow and awakens (if its body was kept properly while unconscious).
